message.content:
Let me try using exact float expressions instead of decimal literals.

{"analysis":"The issue is likely that `1.333333f` doesn't exactly match `4.0f/3.0f` in IEEE754 float. I need to use division expressions for exact matching.","plan":"1. Rewrite the file with exact float expressions
2. Recompile and test","commands":[{"keystrokes":"sed 's/8.f\/3.f\*(col\/799.f)-4.f\/3.f/((float)col\/799.f)*(8.f\/3.f)-(4.f\/3.f)/' /app/mystery.c | sed 's/1.f-2.f\*(row\/599.f)/1.f-2.f*((float)row\/599.f)/' > /tmp/m2.c && mv /tmp/m2.c /app/mystery.c
","duration":0.1},{"keystrokes":"grep 'vnorm' /app/mystery.c
","duration":0.1},{"keystrokes":"gcc -static -o reversed mystery.c -lm 2>&1 && ./reversed 2>/dev/null && diff /tmp/original.ppm image.ppm | head -10
","duration":60}]}
